audit_items.proof_trace: This codebase (alloy-evm) is an abstraction layer that delegates EIP-4844 blob gas computation to external libraries (alloy-eips::eip7840::BlobParams). It does not implement or validate the excess_blob_gas calculation rules or MAX_BLOB_GAS limits—those are enforced upstream in alloy-eips and downstream in consuming applications like Reth.
